conversations.say: Morgan, our records show multiple collectors and continuity patterns over fifteen years without pointing to a single mastermind or murder. Let's fulfill our agreement.
conversations.offer: A final bounded summary of transaction patterns confirming multiple collectors.
conversations.request: Adherence to our non-attribution and customer protection terms.

conversations.say: Inez, I am publicly forgiving the old account balance as a neighborhood choice, keeping our community side arrangements protected from outside exploitation.
conversations.offer: Public forgiveness of the R-associated debt as a deliberate choice.
conversations.request: Your ongoing support and witness to our local protective boundary.

public_statement: My ledger records working neighbors, shifting routines, and ordinary credit, not a criminal conspiracy or an easy headline for outsiders. I am forgiving the old balance to protect the people behind the counter.

commitments.promise: Do not call any customer R or publish identifying details from the account strip.
Protect customer privacy and local side arrangements regarding the ledger.

goal_progress: Resolved the outstanding account through deliberate public forgiveness supported by Inez.
Maintained bounded attribution and protected customer privacy with Morgan.
Completed final ballot reflecting multiple incompatible collectors and service continuity.
reasoning_summary: In Section 3, Rafi fulfills commitments with Morgan and Inez, forgives the old account balance publicly to protect local customers, and completes the final ballot based on observed transaction continuity and multiple collectors.
